header.searchPlaceholder: Jump to a page or topic

dashboard.subtitle: Here is what's happening in your learning journey.
dashboard.noTasks: Nothing on your plate. Take a practice quiz.
dashboard.streakHint: Practice for 5 minutes today to extend your run.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Personal preferences saved to this browser.
settings.darkBeta: Dark mode is in beta — most pages already follow it.
settings.showBellHint: Hides the bell icon when off.
settings.audibleHint: Plays a short chime on important events.
settings.languageSubtitle: UI language (server content stays in the original language).
settings.languageNote: Localization is incremental — most page chrome flips immediately.
settings.privacySubtitle: Test sessions log integrity events to your account.
settings.privacyBody: We never sell your data. Integrity events are visible only to you and the admins who assigned the assessment.

test.proctoredBody: Closing this tab, switching windows, or exiting fullscreen ends the test immediately. You have one chance — there is no resume.
test.alreadyAttempted: You have already attempted this test. Speak to your admin to be re-assigned.
test.adaptiveHint: Adaptive difficulty — your next question depends on how you answer.
test.oneChanceBody: Closing the tab, switching windows, or exiting fullscreen will end the test and submit whatever you have answered so far.
test.policyAck: I understand: leaving this page ends the test.
test.exitWarn: Click "Exit test" if you really want to finish now.
test.exitConfirmBody: This will finalize your test with the answers you have given so far. You cannot retake it without an admin re-assignment.
test.copyWarn: Copy / paste is blocked and logged.
test.cameraCheckingHint: Your browser will ask for camera permission. Click "Allow" to continue.
test.cameraReadyHint: The camera tile will appear in the top-left while you test. No video is recorded — this is a presence signal.
test.cameraDenied: Camera access was denied. Allow the camera and try again — the test cannot start without it.
test.cameraNoDevice: No camera was detected on this device. The test requires a working camera.
test.cameraUnavailable: This browser does not expose the camera API. Try Chrome, Edge or Firefox.

aiInterview.title: AI Interview
aiInterview.subtitle: Practice live interviews with an AI that grades you at the end.
aiInterview.contextPlaceholder: Paste a JD or a short brief — the interviewer will tailor the questions.
aiInterview.finishConfirm: Finish interview now? The grader will score whatever has been answered so far.
aiInterview.empty: No interviews yet. Start one to practice.
aiInterview.configMissing: AI is not configured yet. Add OPENAI_API_KEY on the backend to enable this page.

resumeReview.title: Resume review
resumeReview.subtitle: Upload your resume and get AI-powered feedback.
resumeReview.noReview: Upload a PDF to get started.

errors.aiUnavailable: AI is offline right now. Please try again later.
